decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_s79-hylan-2010 matches an existing registry record exactly. The observation already resolves to this record; all strong identity fields (route_id: S79, borough: Staten Island, corridor: Hylan Boulevard) are consistent. The observation describes a proposed limited-stop variant but its canonical resolution is already set to the existing route_s79-hylan-2010 record.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Introduce Limited stop spacing on S79 to match ridership demands
Speed S79 service with fewer stops and more direct route
